_README: DEPLOY CONFIG TEMPLATE — copy to config/clients/<client-slug>.baseline.json and fill the values. This is the ONLY file you edit per client (plus a secret file). The engine is generic and reads these values; never hardcode client/vertical specifics in code or workflows. Legend: <FILL> = set per client; secret:<key> = lives in the gitignored secret file; engine_default = usually leave as-is. See docs/DEPLOYMENT-CONFIG.md.

secrets._note: engine_default mechanism. Real numbers/passwords go in <client-slug>.secrets.json (gitignored). Reference by 'secret:<key>'.

property._note: Physical/operational facts shown in confirmations and used for housekeeping.

pricing_policy._note: engine_default mechanism. Each priced item carries pricing_status; provisional prices are dry-run/shadow only, confirmed required for live autonomous charge.

catalog._note: VERTICAL SEAM. Lodging = packages; surf shop = rental SKUs; school = lesson types; tours = departures. Fill the shape that matches the vertical; delete the others.

recommendation._note: Ask what the guest WANTS, map to an offering. Avoid asking skill level unless the vertical needs it.

payment._note: engine_default behavior; deploy values = deposit. Deposit supports a tiered rule (common across surf houses: full package vs custom/short stay take different deposits). Use type=flat for a single amount.

tiers._note: only for type=tiered_by_booking_type; otherwise omit. Each tier has an amount + a _match describing when it applies.

standard_package._match: named full package at standard terms

custom_or_short_stay._match: custom-built package or non-standard / shorter stay

service_addons._note: During-stay add-ons (rentals/lessons/meals/yoga/etc). Onsite redeem = guest shows booking msg + payment to staff. Two engine-default pricing mechanisms: (1) tiered_by_quantity for items that get cheaper in bulk (e.g. lessons); (2) bundles for combos with their own price (may be a discount). Bot collects + takes payment; STAFF schedule/redeem.

bundles._note: optional. Combo add-ons with their own price (e.g. wetsuit + board). Omit if no bundles.

lesson_scheduling._note: optional — for verticals/clients that run scheduled lessons. Set bot_assigns_slot=false if staff schedule manually (common). Omit if not applicable.

inventory._note: VERTICAL SEAM (InventoryProvider). Lodging = rooms/beds map (+ rooming rules). Slots = lesson/tour time-slot capacity. Rentals = item x window x quantity x size. Only fill the relevant model.

rooming_rules._note: lodging only — behind a capability flag; omit for non-lodging verticals.

refund_mechanism._note: engine_default mechanism: refunds are always staff-handled; the DEFAULT remedy is configurable. Many surf houses default to a voucher/credit rather than cash. Bot never issues a refund or voucher itself.

staff_queries._note: engine_default; read-only ops Q&A gated by staff_directory. Add/remove safe intents per vertical.
